---
title: "Definition: ExponentialFunction"
---

<details>
<summary>Definition: Exponential Function (OpenStax Textbook)</summary>

An **exponential function** is of the form $b^x$ where $b>0$ and $b \neq 1$.

Note: An exponential function is not an algebraic function.

</details>

<!-- include: Page.KeyCharacteristicsOfExponentialFunction -->
<!-- include: Page.PropertiesOfExponents -->
